summary: Verified 3 validation bug fixes: BC extraction_quality_gate, Auto-clear _detected_by filtering, Readiness terminal shortcut meaningful_count check. All 13 unit tests passed. UI renders correctly.

minor.issue: BC token cannot be obtained (expected - BC API is in demo/sandbox mode)

issues: Document preview shows 'Unable to load document preview HTTP 404' for some documents (missing files on disk)

critical_code_review_comments: bc_validation_service.py lines 328-340: extraction_quality_gate correctly filters _detected_by metadata and fails when no meaningful data
auto_clear_service.py lines 329-365: meaningful_extracted correctly excludes fields ending with _detected_by from count
document_readiness_service.py lines 152-168: Terminal shortcut now requires meaningful_count >= 1 before returning ready_auto_link

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Dashboard, Documents, Document Detail pages render correctly)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing documents
context_for_next_testing_agent: 3 validation bugs fixed and verified: (1) BC validation now rejects docs with only _detected_by metadata via extraction_quality_gate check. (2) Auto-clear now excludes _detected_by fields from minimum extraction count. (3) Readiness terminal shortcut only fires for completed docs with meaningful_count >= 1. Unit tests created in test_validation_auto_clear_readiness_fixes.py cover all scenarios.
mocked_api_note: Microsoft Graph email, JWT Auth (Entra ID), BC API (demo/sandbox mode) - as documented in review_request
